bio.en: From programmer to product manager, from ByteDance to AIGC — building AI-driven content creation tools with strategic thinking and technical intuition.
bio.cn: 从程序员到产品经理，从字节跳动到 AIGC——用战略思维和技术直觉，构建 AI 驱动的下一代内容创作工具。

aspiration.en: To be closer to AIGC application scenarios and users, deeply understanding why products succeed or fail.
aspiration.cn: 更贴近 AIGC 应用场景和用户，深刻理解产品成败的本质原因。
